programmes.show_name: More Forgotten Feelgood Faves!
programmes.show_description: New to the NOW 80s archive - another 40 long forgotten pop classics 1980-1989. Including Hall & Oates, Musical Youth, The Blow Monkeys, The Nolans, Stray Cats and Boogie Box High!

programmes.show_name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun! 1980-89
programmes.show_description: NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi and Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama and Kylie, it's wall-to-wall singalongs and unapologetic 80s fabulousness!
